creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jimmy Olgeni wrote:

> Just activate the play list with at least one file loaded.

It's not our problem. Following is quiote from XMMS home page (www.xmms.org):

-Maxim

Playlist bug in XMMS 1.2.0 / 1.2.1 (Jun 25, 2000)
---------------------------------------------------
If you're not getting any text in your XMMS Playlist window, start XMMS, press
CTRL-P to bring up the preferences window. Go to the options tab, and on the
bottom press browse and choose a new font. That should fix the sillyness :)
